judgment.summary: Exceptional growth and profitability metrics are offset by a high valuation and significant leverage.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 33.2%; next earnings date 2026-06-24.
positives: Revenue growth 196.3% YoY — explosive top-line expansion.
Quarterly earnings growth 770.8% — immense profit acceleration.
Return on equity 39.8% — highly efficient capital utilization.
Forward P/E 7.28x — valuation appears very attractive relative to growth.
negatives: Trailing P/E 35.37x and Price/Sales 14.52x — current valuation is stretched.
Debt/Equity 14.90 — significant leverage on the balance sheet.
Mean analyst target $613.23 is below the current price — suggests caution from the sell-side.
Beta 1.92 — stock exhibits high volatility relative to the market.

news.paragraph: Jim Cramer has recently expressed caution on several semiconductor stocks, including suggesting that Micron (MU) and Sandisk should "come down more." While these comments are from a single commentator, they represent a bearish sentiment in the near term. Investors should consider this commentary alongside the company's upcoming earnings report on June 24th.

headlines.title: Jim Cramer on Sandisk: “Gotta Let It Come Down More”
Jim Cramer Says “I’ve Been Waiting for Micron to Come Down”
Jim Cramer on Western Digital: “That Seems Too Rich to Me”
